title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist open-source coding agent framework with a small core (read, write, edit, bash) and extensible plugin architecture. It supports multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering an alternative to frontier models with rate-limit constraints.
